adjudication_raw:
Review: Sepsis prediction model comparison.

Verdict: critique_wins

The AUROC gap of 0.86 vs. 0.71 is inflated by three compounding methodological problems: window-selection advantage (ML evaluated at best point over 6 hours; qSOFA at single triage point), information advantage (lactate/WBC features available mid-window but not at triage), and purpose mismatch (surveillance tool vs. triage tool). These are design choices confirmed in the paper's own methods. The comparison does not support the claimed 'major advance in early sepsis recognition.'
